title: Peso recorta más de 10 centavos al dólar en semana de revisión del T-MEC
summary: El peso mexicano se aprecia 0.61% frente al dólar, hasta 17.41 unidades, en la semana en que arrancan las negociaciones entre México y Estados Unidos para la revisión del T-MEC, tras la decisión de EU de no renovarlo por 16 años más. El representante comercial de EU, Jamieson Greer, se reunirá con el secretario Marcelo Ebrard en la Ciudad de México, mientras los mercados también están atentos a los próximos anuncios de política monetaria.

title: US probes insurers owned by billionaire Mark Walter over asset disclosures
summary: US prosecutors and securities regulators are investigating insurers owned by billionaire Mark Walter over whether the companies properly disclosed their holdings in affiliated entities. The probe raises fresh questions about disclosure practices and oversight in the insurance sector.

title: ABC para abrir una cuenta de Cetesdirecto desde la app, invierte desde tu celular
summary: El Economista explica cómo abrir una cuenta en Cetesdirecto desde la aplicación móvil, una alternativa de inversión directa sin comisiones ni costos por transacción, cada vez más usada por inversionistas mexicanos que buscan alternativas de ahorro. El proceso de registro consta de tres fases y también puede iniciarse desde el sitio web oficial.

title: US Immigration Policies Sink Mexican Grocery Chain Chedraui
summary: Donald Trump's immigration crackdown in the US is driving the worst stock rout of the year on the Mexican exchange, hitting shares of grocery chain Chedraui particularly hard. The pressure reflects investor concern over how enforcement is affecting the cross-border Mexican consumer and labor economy.

title: Tres mil millones de dólares confirman la megatendencia del Golfo, y el momento de Puerto Progreso en Yucatán
summary: Una columna de opinión analiza la inversión de más de 3,200 millones de dólares de Saronic Technologies en un astillero de próxima generación en Brownsville, Texas, como señal de una megatendencia de inversión en el Golfo de México que también beneficia a puertos mexicanos como Puerto Progreso, en Yucatán. El autor destaca que la clave para atraer estas inversiones es contar con tierra escalable, mano de obra disponible e infraestructura portuaria lista, no solo la tradición histórica del puerto.

title: Z.AI Completes Giant Data Center With Chinese Chips to Train AI
summary: Chinese AI firm Z.AI has completed a massive data center built entirely with domestic Chinese chips, marking a significant step in Beijing's push to reduce dependence on restricted Nvidia hardware for AI development. The move underscores accelerating efforts by Chinese firms to build a self-sufficient AI compute supply chain.

title: BlackRock Eyes More Than $12 Billion Debt for Data Center
summary: BlackRock is seeking to sell more than $12 billion in bonds to help finance a Meta data center campus in El Paso, Texas, part of a growing wave of debt deals funding Big Tech's AI infrastructure buildout. The scale of the financing highlights how capital markets are increasingly underwriting the AI capex boom.

title: US Stocks Rebound From Selloff as Nvidia, Other Chipmakers Rise
summary: US stocks rebounded Monday from last week's slump as chipmakers including Nvidia rallied, ahead of a wave of earnings reports set to test whether Big Tech's AI-driven profit growth can match elevated investor expectations. The bounce highlights how sensitive markets remain to AI capex sentiment.

title: Google Shares Gain on Report of Chip to Boost AI Efficiency
summary: Alphabet shares rose after a report that Google is developing a new server chip specifically designed to optimize its Gemini AI model. The move signals Google's continued push toward custom silicon to improve the efficiency and cost of running its AI systems.

title: Goldman to Sell $2.5 Billion Preferreds Following Spread Low
summary: Goldman Sachs is selling $2.5 billion of new preferred shares just days after a key risk-and-value metric for these securities hit its lowest level since the global financial crisis. The timing suggests the bank is taking advantage of unusually favorable pricing conditions in the preferred market.

title: La verdadera carrera de la inteligencia artificial no es por los algoritmos, es por los datos
summary: Una columna de opinión en Expansión argumenta que la verdadera disputa competitiva en inteligencia artificial ya no se centra en los algoritmos, sino en el acceso y control de los datos con los que se entrenan los modelos. El texto plantea que esta ventaja de datos será determinante para el liderazgo futuro en IA.

title: Moonshot AI's Kimi K3 Stuns Investors, Challenges Anthropic, OpenAI Lead
summary: Chinese AI lab Moonshot's release of its Kimi K3 model has stunned investors and is forcing Silicon Valley to reconsider assumptions about the AI leadership held by Anthropic and OpenAI. The model's reception triggered broader market reaction, including pressure on semiconductor stocks tied to expectations about future AI compute needs.

title: ChatGPT, Claude Infiltrate Dating Apps by Helping Singles Flirt With Matches
summary: Bloomberg reports that singles are increasingly outsourcing dating-app conversations to ChatGPT and Claude, using the AI assistants to draft opening messages and flirt on their behalf. The trend is complicating how romantic connections form and raising questions about authenticity in online dating.

title: Prysmian Signs $6.3 Billion Molex Deal for Data-Center Gear
summary: Prysmian signed a deal worth up to $6.3 billion to supply Koch's Molex unit with optical cables for its data centers, tapping into the broader AI infrastructure build-out. The deal underscores how the AI capex wave is rippling into industrial supply chains well beyond chipmakers.

title: AI Pioneer Kai-Fu Lee's Startup Targets Hong Kong IPO Next Year
summary: 01.ai, the Chinese AI startup founded by Kai-Fu Lee, is pushing ahead with fundraising plans ahead of a targeted Hong Kong IPO in 2027. The move reflects growing investor appetite for exposure to China's AI sector through public listings.

title: Alibaba Shares Rise After Unveiling Upgraded Flagship AI Model
summary: Alibaba shares jumped as much as 5.4% after the company unveiled a preview of its flagship Qwen3.8 Max model, which it positioned as trailing only Anthropic's Fable 5 in capability. The launch signals intensifying competition among frontier AI labs and strong investor interest in China's AI progress.

title: Netflix acelera su apuesta por la IA y confirma que la ha usado en 300 producciones en 2026
summary: Netflix confirmó que ha utilizado inteligencia artificial generativa en 300 producciones a lo largo de 2026, principalmente en la etapa de posproducción, para lograr resultados de mayor calidad a menor costo y en menos tiempo. La compañía señaló que en algunos casos la tecnología permitió crear secuencias complejas, como escenas de multitudes y recreaciones históricas, que de otra forma no habrían sido viables.
